abilities.name: Thunder Fury
abilities.details: Every time Artorias basic attacks or uses Lightning Strike on an enemy hero, he receives a stack of Thunder Fury (maximum 10 stacks). A critical hit will grant him 2 stacks instead.[n]Each Thunder Fury stack increases his [cr]critical damage[/].

abilities.name: Lightning Strike
abilities.details: Artorias fires a blast of lightning in a target direction, dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/] and [cr]critical strike damage[/]) to all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Voltaic Body
abilities.details: Artorias gains bonus [as]attack speed[/] and [ms]movement speed[/] that increases over a short duration. Once it reaches the maximum bonus, the increased speed is maintained for a few more seconds.

abilities.name: Galvanic Tip
abilities.details: Artorias leaps to a target direction and fires a lightning bolt at the nearest enemy (prioritising enemy hero), dealing [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/] and [cr]critical strike damage[/]) and [db]slowing[/] the target for a short duration.

abilities.name: Storm Bringer
abilities.details: Artorias engraves himself with lightning, causing his basic attack and Lightning Strike to release a chain lightning that deals additional [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/] and [cr]critical strike damage[/]) to the target and nearby enemies.
